name: Amagi Corp.
lede: Amagi runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and New Delhi, covering R&D and sales & marketing, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amagi office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amagi Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amagi runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, New Delhi), covering R&D and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Amagi's India footprint covers Bengaluru and New Delhi, spanning R&D and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Broadcasting & Content Delivery Platform, Media Technology Software
about.headquarters: New York, New York, United States

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 24 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Amagi operate in India?
faq.a: Amagi operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amagi have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Amagi's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and New Delhi.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Amagi run in India?
faq.a: Amagi runs R&D and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amagi's India GCCs?
faq.a: Amagi's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amagi's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 24 leaders at Amagi's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
